content: Mattress Mack is the nickname of Jim McIngvale, a Houston-based furniture salesman known for his promotional sales and philanthropic efforts. He has a daughter named Elizabeth, who has spoken publicly about her struggles with obsessive-compulsive disorder (OCD).
